metric.description: Company's Financial statement 'metric' that is estimated. Use the factset-estimates/v#/metrics endpoint for a complete list. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #15034](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/15034).

periodicity.description: Company's 'periodicity' for the estimate record, reflecting Annual, Quarterly, or Semi-Annual report periods.

fiscalYear.description: Company's 'fiscal year' for the estimate record

fiscalPeriod.description: Company's 'fiscal period' for the estimate record.  'Periodicity' defines context for period.

fiscalEndDate.description: Company's 'fiscal end date' for the estimate record expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format

relativePeriod.description: 'Fiscal period' based on relationship to 'estimate date'. This is not applicable for fixed-consensus endpoint. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16598)

currency.description: Currency code for adjusting the data. Use 'ESTIMATE' as input value for the values in Estimate Currency. For a list of currency ISO codes, visit [Online Assistant Page #1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

estimateDate.description: Date of estimate expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16598)

analystId.description: The FactSet Entity Identifier for the analyst making the estimate.

analystName.description: The name of the analyst making the estimate.

brokerId.description: The FactSet Entity Identifier for the broker making the estimate.

brokerName.description: The name of the broker making the estimate.

lastModifiedDate.description: The date at which a broker provided an estimate that is a revision.

prevEstimateDate.description: Date the previous estimate was made expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #16598](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/16598)

prevEstimateValue.description: The value of the previous estimate.

section.description: Section of the estimate.Returns the details of brokers inlcuded and excluded in the consensus

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

inputDateTime.description: Date and time when the data is available at the source.

securityCurrency.description: The currency that the company trades in.

brokerEstimateCurrency.description: The currency in which estimates are made by broker.

estimateCurrency.description: Estimate currency of the requested Security
